title: Waterproofing and Protection
intro: Protect what matters with our high-performance waterproofing and surface protection systems. Engineered to prevent leakage, resist harsh weather, and extend the life of your structures—ideal for roofs, terraces, bathrooms, basements, and more. Trusted by professionals for lasting strength and peace of mind.

products.name: BASF / Sika Master Seal
products.description: MasterSeal 551 is a high-performance, flexible waterproofing coating designed for concrete and masonry surfaces. Ideal for roofs, basements, water tanks, and wet areas, it offers excellent crack bridging, strong adhesion, and long-term protection against water ingress and carbonation. Supplied in a 20 kg pack (5 kg liquid + 15 kg powder), with a 6-month shelf life, and certified under BS 1881 and DIN 1048 standards for proven waterproofing performance.

products.name: BASF Master Seal
products.description: BASF Master Seal is a waterproofing and surface-protection solution from Ethios, engineered to prevent leakage and extend structural life. Contact our technical team for the data sheet, specifications, and application guidance.
